parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: DAT
parameters.description: Specifies the which defines the entries in the ramp.

parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The type of ramp, choose between vertical, horizontal, radial, and circular.

parameters.name: phase
parameters.label: Phase
parameters.description: Offsets the beginning of the ramp.

parameters.name: period
parameters.label: Period
parameters.description: Adjusts the length of the ramp, similar to a UV scaling.

parameters.name: extendleft
parameters.label: Extend Left
parameters.description: Sets the extend (or repeat) conditions of the ramp beyond the defined range. This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the ramp.

parameters.name: extendright
parameters.label: Extend Right
parameters.description: Sets the extend (or repeat) conditions of the ramp beyond the defined range. This parameter determines what happens at the edges of the ramp.

parameters.name: tension
parameters.label: Curve Tension
parameters.description: Only enabled when using Hermite interpolation. Adjusts the tension bias of the Hermite curve used for interpolation.

parameters.name: antialias
parameters.label: Anti-Alias
parameters.description: Sets level of anti-aliasing for Radial and Circular type ramps.

parameters.name: fitaspect
parameters.label: Fit Aspect
parameters.description: Adjusts the fit of Radial and Circular type ramps based on aspect ratio.

parameters.name: dither
parameters.label: Dither
parameters.description: Dithers the ramp to help deal with banding and other artifacts created by precision limitations.

parameters.name: operand
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose which composite operation is performed from this menu. Search the web for 'blend modes' for more detailed information on the effects of each type.

parameters.name: swaporder
parameters.label: Swap Order
parameters.description: Swaps the order of the composite with the input.

parameters.name: color4
parameters.label: Color4
parameters.description: The color and alpha of each ramp keyframe can be set here. Select between an HSV or RGB colorpicker, or click the "+" button to open a color dialog box with predefined colors.

parameters.name: position2
parameters.label: Position2
parameters.description: Sets the center point for radial and circular ramps.

examples.label: Create radial gradient
examples.description: Switch to radial mode for a circular gradient mask.

examples.label: Animate ramp phase
examples.description: Use as a parameter expression on the phase parameter to scroll the gradient.

examples.label: Set ramp period for tiling
examples.description: Tile the ramp 4 times across the image.
